news.headline: French Socialist Leader Olivier Faure: We told Macron we won't accept a right-wing PM 'under any circumstance.'
BTC Digital Ltd. prices $20 million public offering, gross proceeds of $20.0 million expected.
news.summary: In Singapore on December 6, 2024, BTC Digital Ltd. (NASDAQ: BTCT), a blockchain technology company, disclosed the details of a firm commitment underwritten public offering. The offering is projected to generate around $20.0 million in gross proceeds for the Company, before additional costs.

news.headline: France considers taxing Bitcoin HODLers on 'unproductive wealth', alarming a Web3 marketer due to crypto market volatility.
news.summary: An individual in the marketing sector of Web3 expressed concerns to Decrypt about the potential implementation of a Bitcoin tax on unrealized gains. They described the proposal as "worrying" and stated that it seems "out of touch" considering the extreme volatility of the cryptocurrency markets.

news.headline: French Socialist Leader Olivier Faure: President Macron has accepted to see all those who were part of the "republican front".
French Socialist Head: I won't join a government with a right-wing PM.
French Socialist Leader: We told Macron we demand political change and a left-wing PM.
French Socialist Leader: President Macron did not impose any prerequisite on anything.
China has big room to raise fiscal deficit - Xinhua Commentary
Qi Biodesign raises $75M funding for genome editing technologies; Seed, Pre-A, and Series A rounds completed.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, Qi Biodesign, a leading biotechnology firm specializing in advanced genome editing techniques, revealed the successful conclusion of its Series A funding round. With this latest funding, the company has amassed a grand total of $75 million from its Seed, Series Pre-A, and Series A financing rounds.

news.headline: SkyWater to receive $16M from CHIPS for America program to boost semiconductor production in Minnesota.
news.summary: SkyWater Technology, a technology realization partner based in Bloomington, Minnesota, has entered into a preliminary memorandum of terms (PMT) with the CHIPS for America program, overseen by the U.S. Department of Commerce. The PMT is valued at a significant sum, reaching up to $16 million. This potential funding aims to offer federal incentives to bolster production capacities at SkyWater’s facility in Minnesota. The CHIPS Act funding is set to expedite the modernization efforts at the facility.

news.headline: Newmont Corp to sell CC&V for $275M to SSR Mining. Gross proceeds to reach $3.9B from divestitures.
news.summary: Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM, TSX: NGT, ASX: NEM, PNGX: NEM) has announced the sale of its Cripple Creek & Victor (CC&V) operation in Colorado, USA to SSR Mining Inc. for a cash consideration of up to $275 million. This sale is part of Newmont's strategy to divest non-core assets and investment sales, with gross proceeds totaling up to $3.9 billion. The transaction is anticipated to close soon.

news.headline: CRH plc appoints Alan Connolly as Interim CFO effective January 1, 2025, as Jim Mintern transitions to CEO role.
news.summary: In New York, leading building materials solutions provider CRH plc (NYSE: CRH) has named Alan Connolly as the Interim Chief Financial Officer starting January 1, 2025. This move follows the September 24, 2024 announcement that the current Chief Financial Officer, Jim Mintern, will transition to the Chief Executive Officer role on the same date. The selection process was thorough and inclusive, involving an independent recruitment consultant and evaluating candidates from both within the company and externally.

news.headline: United Homes Group, Inc. priced secondary public offering of 7,420,057 Class A shares at $5.00 each. ($5.00, 7,420,057)
news.summary: United Homes Group, Inc. revealed the pricing details for its secondary underwritten public offering, known as the Offering. The Offering consists of 7,420,057 shares of the Company’s Class A common stock, named the Offered Shares, which are priced at $5.00 per share. Notably, 1,448,200 of the Offered Shares are being acquired by the Company’s Executive Chairman, Interim CEO, Kennedy Lewis Agency Partners, LLC affiliates, and certain other parties.

news.headline: Bitcoin's impact on the economy is growing with a market value of over $1 trillion, influencing financial transactions globally.
eMerge Americas announces 2025 Healthtech Innovation Hub presented by Jackson Health System and UHealth, welcoming new partners.
news.summary: In Miami on December 6, 2024, the prestigious global technology conference and expo, eMerge Americas, announced the launch of the Healthtech Innovation Hub for the upcoming year. This initiative is in partnership with Jackson Health System and UHealth – University of Miami Health System. This hub will serve as a platform for showcasing cutting-edge advancements in healthcare technology.

news.headline: ezPaycheck software updated for IRS 2024 forms, helping small businesses streamline year-end tax reporting.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, a prominent software solutions provider for small businesses, Halfpricesoft.com, revealed a major upgrade to its widely used ezPaycheck payroll software. This update guarantees alignment with the current IRS 2024 Form.

news.headline: Beacon Therapeutics reports positive 3-month data from Phase 2 DAWN trial of laru-zova (AGTC-501) in XLRP patients, showing improvement in low luminance visual acuity. Well-tolerated by all participants. Promising results build confidence in laru-zova as a potential treatment.
news.summary: The Phase 2 DAWN study has shown that laru-zova is being well-tolerated by all participants. Early data indicates significant improvements in low luminance visual acuity (LLVA), which is an important indicator of visual function. These positive results are boosting confidence in laru-zova as a potential treatment for patients with X-linked retinitis pigmentosa (XLRP), with promising implications for the future of this therapy.

news.headline: The9's joint venture partner raised annual revenue to RMB900M and profit to RMB300M from RMB600M and RMB200M.
news.summary: In Shanghai on December 6, 2024, The9 Limited revealed that its wholly-owned subsidiary, Shanghai The9 Information Technology Co., Ltd., has signed an amendment agreement to a joint venture agreement. The9, a reputable Internet company listed on Nasdaq as NCTY, made this significant announcement.

news.headline: Front Signs completes 12 sky-high displays along the 14 Freeway for Lancaster Auto Mall, impacting the community.
news.summary: Front Signs has recently unveiled twelve new sky-high displays along the 14 Freeway for the Lancaster Auto Mall in Burbank, California. The project was finalized on December 6, 2024, showcasing eye-catching signs to the community. This initiative is set to have a significant impact by offering increased visibility for the auto mall in the area.

news.headline: Kirkland's reports Q3 2024 results: Net sales <specific number> for 13-week period ended Nov 2, 2024.
news.summary: Nashville, Tennessee - On December 6, 2024, Kirkland's, Inc. (Nasdaq: KIRK), a well-known specialty retailer focusing on home décor and furnishings, revealed its financial performance for the 13-week and 39-week periods concluding on November 2, 2024. In a snapshot of the Third Quarter 2024, the Company reported significant net sales growth...

news.headline: GRVT gains Bermuda license for hybrid crypto exchange. CEO believes regulation can enhance DEXs and promote universal standards.
news.summary: The CEO of GRVT highlighted that there is no need to separate CeFi and DeFi ecosystems, as regulations can play a crucial role in enhancing universal standards for Decentralized Exchanges (DEXs). This approach aims to unify the two sectors and foster collaboration. The CEO emphasized the importance of regulatory measures in elevating DEX operations to meet established global benchmarks. As a result, this strategy can lead to increased trust in the sector and create a more robust framework for the digital asset industry.

news.headline: Origin of significant global seafood supply remains uncertain. Tracking becomes a challenge due to lack of transparency.
Beam Therapeutics appoints Sravan Emany as Chief Financial Officer, effective Dec. 19, 2024. Emany previously served at Ironwood Pharmaceuticals as CFO and COO.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, on December 6, 2024, Beam Therapeutics Inc. (Nasdaq: BEAM), a biotechnology firm specializing in precision genetic medicines utilizing base editing, disclosed the selection of Sravan K. Emany as the chief financial officer (CFO), starting December 19, 2024. Mr. Emany arrives at Beam with extensive worldwide operational, commercial, and financial expertise derived from roles in multinational public companies and financial entities. His prior position was as the CFO and chief operating officer at Ironwood Pharmaceuticals, Inc.

news.headline: Chicago Atlantic BDC, Inc. declares $0.34 cash dividend for Q4 2024, up 36% from Q3's $0.25 dividend.
news.summary: Chicago Atlantic BDC, Inc., a specialty finance company listed on NASDAQ under the symbol LIEN, disclosed a significant update today. The company's board of directors has approved a cash dividend of $0.34 per share for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2024. This amount showcases a substantial 36% surge from the previous quarter's dividend of $0.25 per share that concluded on September 30, 2024.

news.headline: OTC Markets Group adds Grayscale Basic Attention Token Trust to OTCQX, enabling BAT exposure without direct purchase. GBAT now trades as "GBAT."
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that Grayscale Basic Attention Token Trust (OTCQX: GBAT) would start trading on the OTCQX® Best Market as "GBAT." This investment option offers exposure to Basic Attention Token (BAT) without the complexities of directly purchasing, storing, and safeguarding BAT. OTC Markets Group Inc. manages regulated markets for trading 12,000 U.S. and international securities.

news.headline: Landsea Homes priced a secondary offering of 6,086,957 shares at $10.25/share, totaling $62.4 million, by selling stockholders.
news.summary: Dallas, December 6, 2024 - Landsea Homes Corporation (Nasdaq: LSEA), a publicly traded residential homebuilder, disclosed the pricing details of an underwritten public offering. The offering consists of 6,086,957 shares of its common stock, sold by selling stockholders Landsea Holdings Corporation and Ever Fast Holdings Limited. Priced at $10.25 per share, the offering is expected to generate approximately $62.4 million in total gross proceeds for the selling stockholders, excluding underwriting discounts, commissions, and offering expenses. Additionally, the selling stockholders have allowed the underwriters a 30-day option to acquire up to 913,043 more shares at the same price. The Company itself will not be selling any shares in this offering. The anticipated closing date for the offering is around December 9, 2024, pending customary closing conditions.

news.headline: Booz Allen and Palantir partner to accelerate U.S. defense with co-creation partnership; NYSE: BAH & NASDAQ: PLTR involved.
news.summary: A new co-creation partnership has been unveiled by Booz Allen (NYSE: BAH) and Palantir (NASDAQ: PLTR) in an effort to speed up defense mission innovation. This collaboration between the two companies aims to combine their expertise in order to drive advancements in the defense sector. This news comes as Booz Allen is currently trading on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol BAH, while Palantir is traded on the NASDAQ under the symbol PLTR. This strategic partnership is expected to bring together the strengths of both companies to enhance innovation in defense missions.

news.headline: D-Wave CEO Dr. Baratz talks about commercial quantum computing on Fox Business. Company is a leader in quantum tech.
news.summary: D-Wave Quantum Inc., a pioneer in quantum computing systems, software, and services and the first commercial provider of quantum computers globally, revealed that CEO Dr. Alan Baratz recently appeared on Fox Business’ Making Money with Charles Payne to discuss the quantum industry's current status and the tangible benefits of D-Wave’s annealing quantum computing for businesses. The company is listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol QBTS. This appearance follows D-Wave's announcement of reaching a significant milestone with its quantum technology, showcasing tangible real-world applications and solutions for various industries.

news.headline: ECB is said to quiz some banks over SRT buyers’ use of leverage.
Biometrics executive John Bagocius joins FaceTec team as Director of Federal Sales in Summerlin, Nevada, Dec. 6, 2024.
news.summary: In Summerlin, Nevada on December 6, 2024, FaceTec welcomed John Bagocius as the Director of Federal Sales. This addition comes as the company aims to further solidify its dominant role in the 3D Face Verification, digital, and mobile ID sectors worldwide. John's appointment marks a significant move for FaceTec as it continues to enhance its presence in the industry.

news.headline: Holiday season crucial for sales; SMS marketing via ProTexting boosts engagement and drives sales with less effort.
news.summary: During the holiday season, retailers and brands are focused on maximizing sales with minimal resources. Utilizing ProTexting's SMS marketing features can help in achieving this goal. It allows businesses to boost customer interaction and generate more excitement about their holiday offerings.

news.headline: Bayport Management Ltd sets new dates for exchange of outstanding social bonds.
news.summary: Bayport Management Ltd recently announced changes to the record date and exchange date for the exchange of its senior and subordinated social bonds. Investors should take note of the new dates to ensure a smooth exchange process. This update comes as part of Bayport Management Ltd's ongoing efforts to enhance its financial strategies. For further details, interested parties can contact the company directly.

news.headline: SSR Mining buys Cripple Creek & Victor Gold Mine from Newmont for $100m upfront, up to $175m more.
news.summary: SSR Mining Inc. has recently revealed its agreement to purchase the Cripple Creek & Victor Gold Mine (CC&V) in Colorado from Newmont Corporation. The deal, valued at $100 million in initial payment and potential milestone-based payments totaling up to $175 million, has been finalized by the Company. This acquisition marks a significant move for SSR Mining, as it strengthens its portfolio and foothold in the mining sector.

news.headline: IREN Limited released monthly investor update for November 2024 on Dec. 6, 2024. NASDAQ: IREN stands out.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, IREN Limited (NASDAQ: IREN) released its investor update for November 2024. The report provides insights into the company's performance and key figures for the month.

news.headline: Vontier named to Newsweek’s Most Responsible Companies 2025 list, ranking #240, up several hundred spots from last year.
news.summary: A globally prominent company, Vontier Corporation (NYSE: VNT), renowned for its critical technologies and solutions in the mobility sector, has made it to Newsweek’s esteemed list of America’s Most Responsible Companies 2025. This marks the second consecutive year that Vontier has achieved this recognition. Notably, Vontier significantly climbed up the rankings in 2025, securing the #240 position. The accolade, presented by Newsweek in partnership with Statista Inc., underscores Vontier's commitment to responsible business practices.

news.headline: Global microwave ablation devices market valued at $287.5 million in 2023, expected to reach $1 billion by 2034. Key driver: advances in cancer treatment. Minimally invasive procedure using microwave energy to destroy cancerous tissues. Notable for its ability to target tumors with minimal impact on healthy tissues. Rising demand due to reduced recovery time, lower risk, and improved patient comfort. Increasingly used in treating tumors in organs like lungs, kidneys, and liver. Advanced imaging tech like CT scans or ultrasound guides the procedure. Technological advancements fueling market growth.
news.summary: Microwave ablation technology is revolutionizing tumor treatment by using microwave energy to destroy cancerous tissues. The global market for microwave ablation devices was worth US$ 287.5 million in 2023 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 12.2%, reaching US$ 1.0 billion by 2034. This minimally invasive procedure offers advantages like reduced recovery time and lower risk of complications. MWA devices are increasingly used to treat tumors in organs like lungs, kidneys, and liver. The rising demand for minimally invasive procedures, the increasing prevalence of cancer cases, and technological advancements are driving the growth of the market.

news.headline: SP Group's subsidiary, Accoat A/S, will close production activities at Kvistgaard facility within 12 months.
news.summary: Accoat A/S, a subsidiary entirely owned by SP Group, has announced plans to cease all production operations at its Kvistgaard facility over the next year.

news.headline: Economists predict a significant rebound in November with an expected gain of 215,000 jobs, following disruptions in October.
news.summary: Economic experts anticipate that the upcoming data will indicate an increase of 215,000 job positions, reflecting a significant recovery from the previous month. In October, work was heavily impacted by storms in the Southeast and a notable strike, but it is projected that the job market will bounce back strongly in the forthcoming report.

news.headline: Abu Dhabi Grand Prix 2024 to feature sustainable practices at Yas Marina Circuit, continuing green initiatives.
news.summary: In Abu Dhabi, UAE, on December 6, 2024, the Formula 1 Etihad Airways Abu Dhabi Grand Prix 2024 organizers announced that they will continue their environmentally friendly practices for the 16th edition of the race at Yas Marina Circuit. This initiative aims to reduce the event's carbon footprint and promote sustainability.

news.headline: Gundry MD's Polyphenol-Rich Olive Oil has over 1,300 positive reviews on multiple platforms, boosting wellness.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on December 6, 2024, Gundry MD® unveiled its popular Polyphenol-Rich Olive Oil™, which has garnered more than 1,300 favorable reviews across various channels. This olive oil is supercharged with polyphenols, targeting optimal wellness. Renowned for its formulation, this product has gained significant praise for its efficacy.

news.headline: Genesco Inc. surpasses expectations in Q3 of 2025, boosted by Journeys, based in Nashville, Tennessee.
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee, Genesco Inc. has released its fiscal 2025 third-quarter results, which surpassed expectations. The success was primarily fueled by Journeys, one of the company's key segments. Key financial figures included a revenue increase of X% and a profit margin growth of Y%. Genesco Inc.'s strong performance in the third quarter indicates a positive outlook for the company moving forward.

news.headline: South Korea opposition Leader: The likelihood of impeaching Yoon is increasing.
South Korea's Opposition Leader warns of the possibility of another martial law attempt by President Yoon before Saturday's impeachment vote.
It remains a challenge for job seekers to find employment despite the availability of positions in the job market.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was indicated that the unemployment rate had dropped to 4.8%, marking a decrease of 0.2% from the previous month. The economy added 250,000 new jobs, surpassing expectations of 200,000. Additionally, the average hourly earnings saw an increase of 2.5%, demonstrating a positive trend in wage growth. These figures suggest a strengthening labor market and provide optimism for future economic performance.

news.headline: Bank of Korea governor Rhee Chang-yong suggests Trump's trade policies pose higher risk to South Korea's economy than domestic martial law, citing concern over Chinese competition and anticipated heavy tariffs. Economic impact of martial law crisis expected to be limited.
news.summary: The governor of the Bank of Korea, Rhee Chang-yong, has stated that the South Korean economy is facing a greater threat from the trade policies of President-elect Donald Trump than the recent political crisis in the country. Despite the challenges posed by President Yoon Suk Yeol's failed attempt to enforce martial law, which will delay crucial structural reforms in the economy and financial markets, Rhee believes the economic impact of this crisis will be limited compared to the potential consequences of increased Chinese competition and expected heavy tariffs on South Korean exporters from the US. This information was reported by the Financial Times. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: This news article covers 11 important finance stories including ADP's National Employment Report and BofA's 2025 expectations.
news.summary: This week in financial news, notable press releases were issued by ADP and BofA. ADP's National Employment Report provided insights into current job market conditions, revealing that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in November. On the other hand, Bank of America shared its ambitious expectations for the year 2025, outlining strategic plans and growth targets. These updates reflect the dynamic nature of the financial sector, with ADP's report indicating positive job growth and BofA's forward-looking projections signaling confidence in future opportunities.

news.headline: Bain's Rufino discusses Special Situations Strategy on distressed debt – Follow-up for details.
Payroll data likely to spike following Boeing strike resolution and Southeast storm recovery, expecting significant rebound.
news.summary: The recent settlement of the Boeing strike and the bounce back from severe storms in the Southeast are anticipated to result in an increase in the monthly payroll figures. This is expected to lead to significant growth in employment numbers and economic stability in the region.

news.headline: Ex-Congressman Billy Long, who promised large tax refunds, now considered to lead IRS despite controversial pandemic tax credit scheme.
news.summary: After departing Congress in 2023, Billy Long has been promoting a pandemic-era tax credit that the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) has cautioned about due to its susceptibility to fraud.

news.headline: Key consumer news this week: CHI-CHI'S™ revival, Domino's® & Netflix partnership, Frontier Airlines affordable luxury update.
news.summary: This week, there were significant developments in the consumer and retail sectors according to PR Newswire. CHI-CHI'S™ Mexican restaurant is making a comeback, catching the attention of many consumers. Additionally, a strategic partnership has been formed between Domino's® and Netflix, offering an exciting collaboration in the food and entertainment industries. Frontier Airlines has also made headlines with an update on affordable luxury services, demonstrating its commitment to providing quality experiences for customers. This news comes amidst changing consumer preferences and evolving retail trends.
